close_reason: Shale now starts Demux.Server linked in handle_continue(:initialization). Demux pid stored in state.demux.
description:
In handle_continue(:initialization), after SegmentRecycler starts:
1. Start Demux.Server linked to Shale with cluster, object_storage, log: self()
2. Store demux pid in state

Test: Shale init starts Demux.Server, state contains demux pid.
title: Shale: start Demux.Supervisor in initialization
